summary.en: Directive 2014/30/EU is the mandatory technical baseline for in-scope electrically controlled power tools, chargers, and power supplies in the Turkey-referenced CE framework. Turkey-facing evidence should cover marketed configurations, communication interfaces, and worst-case operating modes that affect emissions and immunity limits.
summary.zh: 指令2014/30/EU是土耳其参考CE框架下适用电动工具、充电器和电源的强制EMC基线。土耳其文件应覆盖实际销售配置、通信接口和最不利工况下的发射与抗扰度要求。
summary.zht: 指令2014/30/EU是土耳其參考CE框架下適用電動工具、充電器和電源的強制EMC基線。土耳其文件應覆蓋實際銷售配置、通信接口和最不利工況下的發射與抗擾度要求。

standards_or_laws: EN harmonised EMC routes referenced through TSE TS EN implementation

summary.en: Chinese files may include GB 3883-based safety documentation and domestic EMC reports, but these reports are domestic baseline evidence and not automatically the same as Turkey-facing market evidence.
summary.zh: 中国文件可包含GB 3883安全文件和国内EMC报告，但这些报告属于中国境内基线证据，不会自动等同于土耳其市场证据。
summary.zht: 中國文件可包含GB 3883安全文件和國內EMC報告，但這些報告屬於中國境內基線證據，不會自動等同於土耳其市場證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T domestic EMC guidance where applicable

gap.en: The common gap is incomplete test-config equivalence, where Chinese domestic reports omit the exact export SKU variants and Turkey-facing accessories used in the market filing.
gap.zh: 常见差距是测试配置不完整，中国文件可能未覆盖出口SKU的全部变体和市场文件中使用的配件组合。
gap.zht: 常見差距是測試配置不完整，中國文件可能未覆蓋出口SKU的全部變體和市場文件中使用的配件組合。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation is to show Directive 2014/30/EU conformity for in-scope products; harmonised EN routes are evidentiary support and not standalone legal requirements.
mandatory_status.cn: 中国GB/GB/T证据是国内常规底线，但通常不能直接替代土耳其市场所需的EMC技术链。

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Considered insufficient for Turkey until export variants, interfaces, and worst-case electrical states are matched in one Turkey-facing EMC configuration set.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅当出口变体、接口和最不利电气状态在同一土耳其向文件中完成匹配后，才可视为土耳其可投放。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅當出口變體、接口和最不利電氣狀態在同一土耳其向文件中完成匹配後，才可視為土耳其可投放。
